title: Minecraft But Fish Drop OP Items!
description: This is a data pack I made for my minecraft manhunt where fish are insanely overpowered!
body:
This datapack makes fish (Salmon, cod, tropical fish and puffer fish) drop overpowered items such as diamonds, OP tools and armor, golden apples, etc... 

You can use this data pack in minecraft manhunts, in minecraft challenges or servers to make the game a lot easier to beat.

This is a mod I made for a minecraft manhunt youtube video

This datapack does not add anything other than OP fish.

Also if the datapack says it needs a newer or an older version just enable it anyway it should work (I don't know why but it does that sometimes).
